title: Server Info Panel
description: Shows server info in the pause menu
body:
# Server Info Panel

A lightweight client-side mod that displays server information in the pause menu when connected to a multiplayer server.

## Features

- Server name and MOTD display
- Server icon/favicon support
- Real-time ping indicator with visual status
- Player count information
- Works with both saved servers and direct IP connections
- Automatically adapts to different GUI scales
- Non-intrusive panel design that doesn't block menu buttons

## How it works

When you press ESC while playing on a multiplayer server, a panel appears showing all relevant server information. The mod automatically fetches server data for direct connections, ensuring you always see accurate information regardless of how you joined the server.
